briefdescription.para: Creates a new TextVisualizer.

detaileddescription.para: A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference()

briefdescription.para: TextVisualizerImpl constructor.
Sets the text.

parameterdescription.para: The text to display in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Gets the text.

simplesect.para: The text currently set on the text visualizer in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font family of the text.

parameterdescription.para: The requested font family to use.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font family of the text.

simplesect.para: The font family currently set on the text visualizer.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font size of the text.
Gets the font size of the text.

simplesect.para: The font pixel size currently set on the text visualizer.

briefdescription.para: Sets the relative line height multiplier.

detaileddescription.para: If the line height is positive, it is calculated as a multiplier of the font pixel size:
If the line height is -1.0f, natural line height is used.
Only relative line height is supported by TextVisualizer in this revision.

parameterdescription.para: The relative line height multiplier, or -1.0f for automatic line height.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current line height multiplier.

simplesect.para: The relative line height multiplier, or -1.0f when natural line height is used.

briefdescription.para: Clears the line height override and restores natural line height.
Sets the color of the text.
Gets the color of the text.

simplesect.para: The text color currently set on the text visualizer.

briefdescription.para: Prepares the current text state for layout.

detaileddescription.para: This is an eager command. In this commit it only updates internal dirty state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the exclusion regions used by the future layout pass.

parameterdescription.para: Regions where text should not be placed.

briefdescription.para: Gets the currently stored exclusion regions.
Clears all exclusion regions.
Called after the actor has been initialized.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.

parameterdescription.para: Available visual (scale-applied) width, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.
Available visual (scale-applied) height, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector2 &size, bool updateRenderDataResult, bool attachResult) const
memberdef.name: LogRenderDiagnostics

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for TextVisualizer.

detaileddescription.para: This commit intentionally keeps the implementation minimal.
